prompt: Design a multi-agent investment analysis system similar to AI Investment OS. The system should analyze stocks using multiple specialized agents: News Agent (sentiment analysis), Financial Agent (fundamental analysis), Technical Agent (chart patterns and indicators), Risk Agent (risk assessment), and Report Agent (synthesis). Implement the complete workflow with LangGraph, including: parallel agent execution, structured prompts for financial analysis, state management for tracking analysis progress, and output validation. Provide production-ready code with error handling.

assertions.text: System implements all 5 core agents (News, Financial, Technical, Risk, Report)
News Agent includes sentiment analysis with confidence scoring
Financial Agent analyzes key metrics (PE, ROE, revenue growth, etc.)
Technical Agent covers multiple indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages)
Risk Agent provides risk scoring and factor analysis
Report Agent synthesizes all agent outputs into coherent report
LangGraph workflow includes parallel execution for independent analysis agents
State management uses TypedDict with proper investment-specific fields
All agents produce structured JSON outputs with confidence scores
Code includes citation tracking and source attribution for all claims
